system.description:
The psyker locates and tracks a single object or person. Must have familiarity with the target (have seen them, have their true name, or hold an associated object). Psyniscience Test modified by familiarity: +10 intimately familiar, +5 has a portion of the subject, +5 within 50m × PR, –10 target in a crowd, –20 over 2km. DoS 0 = rough direction; DoS 2 = specific direction and rough distance; DoS 4 = specific direction and exact distance.

Focus Power Test: Psyniscience

XP Cost: 100
